senses.gloss: to denounce (someone) as dishonorable or shameful for (something), to shame; to defame; to besmirch; to stigmatize

examples.text: أَعَيَّرْتَنِي قُرَّ الحَلَاءَةِ شَاتِيًا / وَأَنْتَ بِأَرْضٍ قُرُّهَا غَيْرُ مُنْجِمِ
examples.english: Shaming me, you say that I am wintering in woodlands / while you yourself are in a land with an unceasing chill!

examples.text: عَيَّرَتْنِي بِٱلشَّيْبِ وَهُوَ وَقَارُ / لَيْتَهَا عَيَّرَتْ بِمَا هُوَ عَارُ
examples.english: She shamed me for my age, yet eld is reverence. / Would I be shamed for what is truly shameable!

senses.gloss: to measure according to a set standard
a donkey; a wild ass; an onager
